predictions.source_quote: CIO is looking for a 4% earnings contraction in the US
2% growth in Asia for the full year

predictions.variable: Federal Reserve final rate hike timing
predictions.forecast_value: Final rate hike by Q1 2023 or Q2 2023 at the latest
predictions.source_quote: CIO expects the Federal Reserve, the European Central Bank, the Swiss National Bank, and the Bank of England to conduct their final rate hikes in the first quarter of 2023, or the second quarter at the latest.
